code: import{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function SearchMovies(){const[movieTitle,setMovieTitle]=useState('');const searchMovie=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const url="https://www.omdbapi.com/?i=tt3896198&apikey=1344ff48=".concat(movieTitle);try{const response=await fetch(url);const data=await response.json();console.log(data);}catch(err){console.log(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:searchMovie,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"query",children:"Movie Title"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"query",value:movieTitle,onChange:e=>setMovieTitle(e.target.value),placeholder:"Enter a ,ovie title",role:"search"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Search Movie"})]})});}export default SearchMovies;
